business.name: ClickAds Protector
business.niche: Click fraud protection and complete Google Ads management for service-based businesses

notes: Search demand is dominated by two distinct pillars: broad Google Ads optimization tasks (negative keywords, scripts, landing pages) and the brand's core differentiator, click fraud protection/detection software. The strategy uses click fraud protection as the pillar to match brand positioning while capturing the much larger negative-keywords and landing-page volume as supporting MOFU/TOFU clusters that funnel into the core service pages, with dedicated BOFU pages for direct competitor comparison (PPC Protect/Lunio) and transactional 'click fraud protection service' intent.

workflow_inputs.main_topic: Click Fraud Protection for Google Ads
workflow_inputs.problem_clusters: Click Fraud Protection for Google Ads :: Negative Keywords Setup and Management, High Converting Landing Pages for Google Ads, Click Fraud Detection Software and Tools, Google Ads Scripts and Automation, Negative Keyword Types and Definitions, Click Fraud Protection Services, Google Ads Management for Small Business, PPC Protect and Lunio Alternatives

questions.q: how do I add negative keywords in Google Ads
questions.answer_angle: Give the exact click-path (Keywords > Negative Keywords > Add) as the first line.

questions.q: what is a good negative keyword list to start with
questions.answer_angle: Provide a downloadable starter list example with 10-15 universal negatives.

questions.q: what's the difference between exact, phrase, and broad match negative keywords
questions.answer_angle: Use a 3-row comparison table defining each match type with an example.

questions.q: how do I find negative keywords for my campaign
questions.answer_angle: Explain using Search Terms report as step one, name the exact menu path.

questions.q: can you add negative keywords to Performance Max campaigns
questions.answer_angle: State the current limitation/workaround (account-level negative keyword lists) directly.

questions.q: what negative keywords should an ecommerce store use
questions.answer_angle: List industry-specific ecommerce negative keyword examples (free, cheap, jobs, DIY).

free landing page for google ads

questions.q: what makes a good landing page for Google Ads
questions.answer_angle: List the top 3 conversion elements (single CTA, matched message, fast load) upfront.

questions.q: how do I create a landing page for my Google Ads campaign
questions.answer_angle: Give a 4-step process starting with message match to the ad copy.

questions.q: are there free tools to build a Google Ads landing page
questions.answer_angle: Name 2-3 free/low-cost builders and note their limitations.

questions.q: what is Quality Score and how does my landing page affect it
questions.answer_angle: Define Quality Score in one line and name landing page experience as one of 3 factors.

clusters.cluster_name: Click Fraud Detection Software and Tools

keywords.keyword: mobile ad fraud detection and prevention

questions.q: what is the best click fraud protection software
questions.answer_angle: Name the top 3-5 tools with a one-line differentiator each and list ClickAds Protector's core feature set first.

questions.q: how does click fraud detection software work
questions.answer_angle: Explain IP/behavioral analysis and automated blocking in 2-3 steps, leading with the mechanism definition.

questions.q: is click fraud protection software worth it for small businesses
questions.answer_angle: State a clear yes/no upfront then give the average wasted ad spend percentage it prevents.

questions.q: how much does click fraud prevention software cost
questions.answer_angle: Lead with a price range ($/mo) and note what's typically included at each tier.

questions.q: can Google detect and block click fraud automatically
questions.answer_angle: Clarify Google's limits versus third-party tools, citing IP exclusion list limitations.

questions.q: what are Google Ads scripts used for
questions.answer_angle: Define scripts as automation code with 2-3 common use cases listed first.

questions.q: how do I write a Google Ads budget pacing script
questions.answer_angle: Give the basic script structure and where to paste it in Google Ads.

questions.q: are there free Google Ads scripts I can use
questions.answer_angle: Point to specific script examples (n-gram, negative keyword, budget) with source credit.

questions.q: how do I add a script to my Google Ads account
questions.answer_angle: Give exact navigation path: Tools > Bulk Actions > Scripts.

keywords.keyword: google ads negative keyword match types

questions.q: what is a negative keyword in Google Ads
questions.answer_angle: Give a one-sentence dictionary-style definition first, then an example.

questions.q: what are the types of negative keyword match types
questions.answer_angle: List all 3 types (broad, phrase, exact) in a short bulleted answer.

questions.q: why are negative keywords important for advertisers
questions.answer_angle: Lead with the benefit: preventing wasted spend on irrelevant clicks.

questions.q: who offers click fraud protection as a service
questions.answer_angle: Position managed click fraud protection services as done-for-you, naming the core deliverables.

questions.q: how do I hire someone to stop click fraud on my ads
questions.answer_angle: Give a 3-step onboarding process and expected time-to-block for fraudulent IPs.

questions.q: what does a click fraud detection service include
questions.answer_angle: List monitoring, auto-blocking, and reporting as the three pillars, in that order.

questions.q: how quickly can a click fraud protection service stop wasted spend
questions.answer_angle: Cite a specific timeframe (e.g., real-time to 24 hours) as the featured answer.

mode5_pseo.notes: No city or regional terms appear anywhere in the keyword set — all queries are national/generic. A pSEO city rollout is not currently supported by search demand; consider a future local layer only if location-specific ad-fraud queries emerge.
